report.summary: Community growth cycle v32 (Mar 16): CLARITY Act stablecoin yield war as lead narrative — ABA blocks White House compromise, 72% prediction market odds for 2026 signing; Venus Protocol $3.7M flash loan hack for DeFi security angle; Strategy's race to 1M BTC (738,731 held, 6,158/week); Ethereum Strawmap 2029 (sub-second finality, quantum resistance); BlackRock ETHB first yield-bearing crypto ETF; full May 1 newsletter drafted; 2 social cards created (CLARITY Act Banks vs DeFi + Strategy 1M BTC Race); posting schedule: Mon CLARITY thread → Tue Venus hack thread → Wed Strategy BTC thread → Thu newsletter → Fri stablecoin yield poll + institutional BTC discussion → Sat Ethereum Strawmap thread → Sun weekly wrap.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Monday, 5 posts): CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield War — ABA blocks White House compromise over yield provision; banks (0.5% APY) vs stablecoins (4-8% APY); $200B+ market cap at stake; 72% prediction market signing odds; CTA to /learn/crypto-regulations-2026 + /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026
Tweet (Monday): CLARITY Act single — ABA torpedoed the bill over stablecoin yield, not consumer protection

Twitter thread (Tuesday, 5 posts): Venus Protocol $3.7M flash loan hack — attack anatomy, Balancer $120M context, Aave V4 security contrast, what to check before depositing; CTA to /tools/lending-comparison + /defi-lending + /learn/aave-v4-guide
Tweet (Tuesday): Venus hack single — security gap between top-tier and mid-tier DeFi is a chasm

Twitter thread (Wednesday, 5 posts): Strategy's Race to 1M BTC — 738,731 held, 3.5% of supply, buying 6,158/week; institutional context (BlackRock $55B, ETFs $88B); risk analysis; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator + /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide + /prices
Tweet (Wednesday): Strategy BTC single — institutions removing BTC faster than miners produce it

Newsletter (Thursday May 1): Market pulse (BTC $71-74K, ETHB launch, Fear & Greed recovering); CLARITY Act stablecoin fight; new pages (Morpho guide, Story Protocol preview, Aster Chain preview); worth reading (Bitcoin Treasury Companies, Stablecoin Yield Strategies); Degen Corner on DeFi security gaps
Twitter poll (Friday): Stablecoin yield question — should issuers offer yield? Banks vs DeFi framing
Tweet (Friday): Institutional BTC concentration discussion — at what point does it become a risk?

Twitter thread (Saturday, 5 posts): Ethereum Strawmap 2029 — sub-second finality, built-in privacy, quantum resistance, L2 convergence, increased throughput; CTA to /learn/ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap + /prices + /learn/based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide
Tweet (Sunday): Weekly market wrap — CLARITY Act, Venus hack, Strategy BTC, Strawmap, ETHB, institutional inflows
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-16-social-drafts-v32.md

metrics.label: /learn/crypto-regulations-2026
metrics.value: CLARITY Act stablecoin yield fight is most consequential US regulatory battle — ABA blocks bill, 72% signing odds; highest topical relevance this cycle

metrics.label: /tools/dca-calculator
metrics.value: Evergreen #1 traffic driver — Strategy's 6,158 BTC/week accumulation creates 'DCA at institutional scale' narrative hook

metrics.label: /tools/lending-comparison
metrics.value: Venus $3.7M hack + Balancer $120M creates urgency for protocol comparison; security-focused audience is high-value

metrics.label: /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide
metrics.value: Strategy 738,731 BTC, BlackRock $55B IBIT, ETFs at 6% of supply — institutional accumulation thesis is data-rich and shareable

metrics.label: /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026
metrics.value: Stablecoin yield under regulatory threat — CLARITY Act outcome determines viability of entire DeFi lending category

metrics.label: /learn/ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap
metrics.value: Strawmap 2029 announcement — sub-second finality and quantum resistance positions ETH as long-term infrastructure play

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-clarity-act-yield-war.svg — 1200x630 social card: split-panel Banks vs Stablecoins comparison; LEFT (red): ABA/Banks panel showing 0.5% APY, business hours liquidity, KYC required, 4,000+ bank lobby; RIGHT (green): Stablecoins panel showing 4-8% APY, 24/7/365 liquidity, permissionless, $200B+ market cap; VS badge center; title 'The Stablecoin Yield War'; 72% prediction market badge; brand gradient accents. Saved to /public/social-clarity-act-yield-war.svg

social-strategy-1m-btc-race.svg — 1200x630 social card: progress bar showing 738,731/1,000,000 BTC (73.9%); stats grid: $53B portfolio value, 6,158 BTC weekly buy rate, 3.5% supply ownership; institutional context panel (BlackRock $55B, ETFs $88B, $1.06B weekly inflows); supply squeeze panel (miners 450 BTC/day vs Strategy 880 BTC/day — institutions absorbing 2x faster); CTA to DCA calculator. Saved to /public/social-strategy-1m-btc-race.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: v32 covers Mon-Sun Apr 28 – May 4 — no overlap with v31 (Apr 21-27)
497 pages published, 2 in queue (story-protocol-ip-guide, aster-chain-guide)
CLARITY Act stablecoin yield battle targets 'crypto regulation 2026' and 'stablecoin yield' keywords — high search volume, underserved
Venus Protocol hack creates urgency for lending comparison tool — security-conscious audience is high conversion
Strategy 1M BTC narrative is data-rich and highly shareable — specific numbers drive engagement; links to DCA calculator (evergreen #1 tool)
Ethereum Strawmap 2029 positions degen0x as forward-looking; weekend educational content gets highest save/bookmark rates
Newsletter distributes Morpho protocol guide (newly published Day 47b) + previews Story Protocol and Aster Chain (in queue)
BlackRock ETHB staked ETH ETF launched March 12 on Nasdaq — first yield-bearing crypto ETF; convergence with stablecoin yield narrative
BTC at $71-74K range; ETH $2,100-2,300; Fear & Greed at 23 (recovering from 38-day Extreme Fear streak)
SEC-CFTC MOU + GENIUS Act + CLARITY Act = three-layer regulatory narrative running through v31 and v32
Social cards saved to /public/social-clarity-act-yield-war.svg and /public/social-strategy-1m-btc-race.svg
Posting schedule: Mon CLARITY Act → Tue Venus hack → Wed Strategy BTC → Thu newsletter → Fri polls/discussion → Sat Ethereum Strawmap → Sun weekly wrap
